name: HUBSPOT INC
business: HubSpot provides an agentic customer platform that helps marketing, sales, and customer service teams drive business growth, including AI-powered agents and engagement hubs, a Smart CRM, and a connected ecosystem. They primarily sell to mid-market B2B companies (2-2,000 employees) on a subscription basis. As of December 31, 2025, they had 288,706 Customers in more than 135 countries and total revenue of $3.1 billion.
sellsTo: Companies in over 135 countries across many industries

exposures.sentence: Breeze is our AI that powers the customer platform, including our Smart CRM, engagement Hubs, and the connected ecosystem.

catalysts.event: Authorized share repurchase program of up to $1.0 billion over 24 months
catalysts.sentence: On February 7, 2026, our Board of Directors authorized a share repurchase program for the repurchase of shares of the company’s common stock, in an aggregate amount of up to $1.0 billion (the '2026 Share Repurchase Program') over a period of up to 24 months.

catalysts.event: Entered into a $500 million revolving credit facility
catalysts.sentence: On February 10, 2026, we entered into a Credit Agreement with Bank of America, N.A., as the administrative agent and L/C Issuer, and the banks and other financial institutions or entities party thereto as lenders (the 'Revolving Credit Agreement'). The Revolving Credit Agreement provides for (i) a five year senior secured revolving credit facility in the amount of up to $500 million and (ii) an uncommitted incremental facility subject to certain conditions.
